visual_description: This is a medium shot of two men in a conversation. The man on the left, with dark, styled hair, is wearing a pink and white plaid button-down shirt. He is looking at the other man and speaking with an earnest expression. The man on the right is seen from a side and back angle, wearing a blue and white checkered shirt. He is turned towards the first man, listening. The background consists of a light-colored wall with a large, ornate, gold-framed picture hanging on it. To the left, a dark, decorative wall sconce is visible. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip. A man speaks in a slightly rushed and insistent tone, as if trying to clarify a detail quickly. He says, "Yeah, in in... yeah, in in three minutes." His voice is clear and direct, with a hint of urgency. In the background, the faint, ambient sound of a live audience can be heard, suggesting the scene is from a sitcom.
